name: Crystal Beach Community Church
description: Crystal Beach Community Church is a place to play pickleball in Bolivar Peninsula, TX. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Hometown Heroes Park
description: Hometown Heroes Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in League City, TX. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like lights, locker rooms, restrooms, water, and trainers or lessons.

name: Jamaica Beach RV Resort
description: Come play pickleball at Jamaica Beach RV Resort in Jamaica Beach, TX! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. Players have access to restrooms.

description: Municipal free courts.

name: Lowry Fitness Center
description: Lowry Fitness Center is a place to play pickleball in Texas City, TX. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and locker rooms.

name: Lynn Gripon @Countryside Park
description: Come play pickleball at Lynn Gripon @Countryside Park in League City, TX! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to lights, restrooms, and water. You can reserve the courts.

name: Mac McGaffey Highland Bayou Park
description: Come play pickleball at Mac McGaffey Highland Bayou Park in La Marque, TX! There are 6 outdoor concrete and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights and restrooms. The courts are free.

name: McGuire-Dent Outdoor Courts
description: Come play pickleball at McGuire-Dent Outdoor Courts in Galveston, TX! There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Mcguire-Dent Recreation Center
description: Daily morning sessions with varied scheduling.  Great drop in open play, very friendly, paddle stack system.  Free for Galveston residents, $5 daily fee for visitors.
fees: Fee required — Membership is free for Galveston residents.

name: Perry Family YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Perry Family YMCA in League City, TX! There are 3 hard and wood courts. 2 are indoors and 1 is outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: San Luis Resort
description: San Luis Resort is a place to play pickleball in Galveston, TX. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.

name: scoggins sticking courts
description: scoggins sticking courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Galveston, TX. There are 3 outdoor courts. You’ll need to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and lights.

name: South Shore Lakes
description: Come play pickleball at South Shore Lakes in League City, TX! There are 4 outdoor hard and concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Reservations are not available. The courts are private.
fees: Private — No fees, but must enter with a resident to play

name: South Shore Villages
description: Come play pickleball at South Shore Villages in League City, TX! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: St. Mary Catholic School
description: St. Mary Catholic School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in League City, TX. There are 6 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: The Fitness Center at South Shore Harbour
description: The Fitness Center at South Shore Harbour is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in League City, TX. There are 13 wood and hard courts. 3 are indoors and 10 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, lights, locker rooms, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility. A membership is required to play.

name: Westover Park
description: Come play pickleball at Westover Park in League City, TX! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. You can’t reserve the courts. Amenities include lights.
